heading: Establishment of standards and criteria; publication in the Federal Register
label: 2804 Establishment of standards and criteria; publication in the Federal Register

children.label: a
children.text: The Secretary of Commerce is hereby authorized and directed to establish and maintain standards, definitions, and criteria which are adequate to carry out the purposes of section 2802(a)(1) and ; andsection 2803(a) of this title

children.label: b
children.text: Standards, definitions, and criteria established by the Secretary and such revisions in them as he may make from time to time shall be published in the Federal Register.
